title: Better Armed Bedwars Pack
description: Models and sounds for Armed Bedwars. Check out mod for custom animations and better sounds.
body:
# NEXT ARMED ROTATION SEP 12th 2024 9pm PST
# Better Armed Bedwars
_This resourcepack is unaffiliated with Hypixel Inc_

This Resourcepack adds custom models and sounds for use on Hypixel's Armed Bedwars. Though there are some slight gui improvements with optifine, this pack works just fine in vanilla 1.8.9. I would not recommend this pack unless you absolutely refuse to install client-side mods on Hypixel. I recommend installing the full [Better Armed Bedwars Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-armed-bedwars) as this pack is a poor substitute.

While making this pack I was extremely limited by the vanilla / optifine texture api.

Because of this, I made a mod that greatly improves upon this pack by adding animations and distinguishing between sound sources so that previously shared sounds can be unique.

## [>> Please Check Out This Improved Version! <<](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-armed-bedwars)
